headline: Cummins stock makes eye-catching move amid data center shift
summary: For most of the past decade, owning Cummins (CMI) meant betting on heavy trucks, diesel engines, and the health of the freight economy. But that narrative is quickly becoming outdated. The company has spent 2026 pivoting into something investors didn’t expect: a strategic player in the AI ...
